name: Okta: Role Assignments - All Built-in Roles
description: Lists all role assignments, linking principals to their assigned built-in roles.
query:
MATCH path = (:Okta_Organization)-[:Okta_Contains]->(assignee)-[:Okta_HasRole]->(:Okta_Role)
WHERE assignee:Okta_User OR assignee:Okta_Group OR assignee:Okta_Application
RETURN path
LIMIT 1000
